name: Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Black beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
1 can Diced tomatoes in juice, undrained (14 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Over medium heat, sauté onion in oil in a Dutch oven until soft, about 5 minutes.
2. Add turkey and cook, stirring with a wooden spoon to break up large pieces, until no longer pink, about 7 minutes.
3. Stir in garlic, chili powder, pepper, and cumin.
4. Add beans, tomatoes and their juice, tomato paste, broth, and corn.
5. Simmer for eight minutes, or until thoroughly hot, stirring often.
6. Garnish with chopped onion.
